message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 class "Brain" { pythons = [] pips = [] python_default python2_default python3_default pip_default pip2_default pip3_default visualisation = "" verbose = true report_obj = {} sites = {} } note top of Brain : |Brain's attributes| python_default, python2_default, python3_default\npip_default, pip2_default, pip3_default\get stored into the Brain's report objects'\ndefaults = {}\n defaults.python \ndefaults.python2\ndefaults.python3\ndefaults.pip\ndefaults.pip2\ndefaults.pip3\nattributes, respectively. class Base{ path=path paths_all=Set is_default=false is_default2=false is_default3=false result_shell_ls result_shell_version result_shell_file_size version size warnings=[] report_obj={} -- get exists() analyse() report()} class Python{ result_shell_site_info result_shell_run_pip_as_module sys_path=[] pip_module_version pip_module_site_package_path pips=[] analyse() -- analyse()} class Pip{site_package_path pythons=[] --- analyse() analyse_version() report()} class Site{ path=path pythons= Set pips= Set } Pip -up-|>Base Python-up-> | >Base ' relationships between classes "Pip"-->"Site":sites * "Python"-right--> "*"|"Site"|:"*" "Brain"-"*":"pips *" -->"Pip" "Brain"-"*":"pythons "-->*"Python" @enduml
